steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata -v
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
We are willing to support monitoring ***[Supervisord](http://supervisord.org/)*** with netdata.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Supervisord monitoring
steps.description:
thx, i setup the lab and get processes info metrics ([`supervisor.getAllProcessInfo`](http://supervisord.org/api.html#supervisor.rpcinterface.SupervisorNamespaceRPCInterface.getAllProcessInfo)):

```go
{Name:00 Group:proc1 Start:1607884769 Stop:1607884771 Now:1607887222 State:200 StateName:FATAL
```yaml
> list of configured supervised jobs
number of running processes for every job
number of not running processes per job
status of each process (running/starting/failed etc)
uptime of each process (combined to 1 chart for every configured job)

About charts, do you mean a subsection per a job (process’ group), something like this: (?)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Supervisord monitoring" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
thx, i setup the lab and get processes info metrics ([`supervisor.getAllProcessInfo`](http://supervisord.org/api.html#supervisor.rpcinterface.SupervisorNamespaceRPCInterface.getAllProcessInfo)):

```go
{Name:00 Group:proc1 Start:1607884769 Stop:1607884771 Now:1607887222 State:200 StateName:FATAL SpawnErr: ExitStatus:0 StdoutLogfile: StderrLogfile: PID:0}
{Name:00 Group:proc2 Start:1607887220

prerequisites.description: A working netdata installation or development environment.
